name: SpecDomain
tldr: Per-feature spec containers holding intent, plans, tasks, and artifact relationships.

name: SharedArtifactDomain
tldr: The shared knowledge layer — domains, contracts, rules, assumptions indexed by manifest.json.

name: SpecResolutionDomain
tldr: Priority chain for resolving the active spec: arg > env > current-spec file > git branch.

name: DistributionDomain
tldr: npm and PyPI packaging, version bumping, and CI publish workflows.

name: TemplateDomain
tldr: Build-time template embedding; runtime template access via the TEMPLATES map.
